scripts.ops:staging:login-probe: (test -n "$STAGING_LOGIN_PROBE_AUTH_TOKEN" || test -n "$PROBE_FIREBASE_REFRESH_TOKEN") && node ./scripts/staging-login-latency-probe.mjs --attempts 12 --timeout-ms 8000 --max-p95-ms 5000 --min-success-rate 1 || (echo 'STAGING_LOGIN_PROBE_AUTH_TOKEN or PROBE_FIREBASE_REFRESH_TOKEN is required for pnpm ops:staging:login-probe' >&2; exit 2)
scripts.ops:prod-shape:gate:run: PROD_SHAPE_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 PROD_SHAPE_ACCEPTED_P95_MAX_MS=250 PROD_SHAPE_ACCEPTED_P99_MAX_MS=750 PROD_SHAPE_GATEWAY_EVENT_LOOP_P99_MAX_MS=1500 PROD_SHAPE_SIM_AI_TICK_P99_MAX_MS=5000 PROD_SHAPE_PLAN_ROUND_TRIP_P99_MAX_MS=5000 PROD_SHAPE_AI_DRAIN_P99_MAX_MS=1500 node ./scripts/rewrite-prod-shape-gate.mjs
scripts.test:scripts: node --test scripts/ai-labeling-common.test.mjs scripts/ai-labeling-sample.test.mjs scripts/ai-labeling-qa.test.mjs scripts/check-file-line-limits.test.mjs scripts/prod-shape-gate-guards.test.mjs scripts/rewrite-concurrent-load.test.mjs scripts/firebase-token-refresh.test.mjs
